title: Pelosi: “We will not rest until the survivors can rest.”
summary: Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi and Jessica Tarlov discuss the arrest of Prince Andrew, and the 3 million documents in the Epstein Files that still haven’t been released, on Raging Moderates.
transcript_html:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/BQbxqAyKpHg

Transcript

Former Prince Andrew was arrested in the UK over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein. Do you think that we will see more Epstein files, or that there will be any justice for these survivors at some point? Well, until the survivors are satisfied, we will continue to fight for the Epstein files. This is ridiculous. There is no justice until they are satisfied that those who have abused them wreck their lives, are brought to some justice, even if that means they're losing their job. But as was witnessed in the UK, even being a prince, no one is above the law.

there’s Approximately 6 million pieces of evidence that we know of, 3 million has been released. 3 million have not been released. What's in there that the president is trying to hide? It is a cover-up. There's just something grossly unfair in it. And we will not rest until the survivors can rest.
